sprints.name: Yagi-Uda Foundation + Core Infrastructure
sprints.description: Implement Yagi-Uda antenna geometry, improve near-field transforms, and establish core infrastructure for advanced features

tasks.title: Implement Yagi-Uda Array Antenna Geometry
tasks.description: Create YagiUdaAntenna struct with driven element, directors array, and reflector. Include element spacing, lengths, and wire radius parameters. Generate mesh segments for each element.
acceptance_criteria: YagiUdaAntenna generates 3-element array (reflector + driven + director) with configurable spacing
Element lengths follow standard Yagi design ratios (reflector 5% longer, director 5% shorter than driven)
Mesh generation produces correct wire segments for MoM solver input
Antenna impedance at driven element matches theoretical ~50Ω for optimized design

tasks.title: Near-Field to Far-Field Transform Improvements
tasks.description: Enhance NF2FF calculations with better numerical integration, phase center correction, and coordinate system handling for array antennas
acceptance_criteria: Far-field patterns show correct Yagi directivity (>8dBi forward gain)
Front-to-back ratio >15dB for standard 3-element Yagi
Phase center calculation accurate within 0.1λ for array geometries
Coordinate transform handles arbitrary antenna orientation

tasks.title: Touchstone S2P File Export
tasks.description: Implement S2P (2-port) Touchstone export for multi-port antennas and antenna arrays with mutual coupling data
acceptance_criteria: S2P files export with correct frequency points and S-parameter matrix
File format complies with Touchstone v1.1 specification
Mutual coupling S21/S12 parameters accurate within 1dB vs reference
Export handles frequency sweep from 50MHz to 2GHz

tasks.title: WGPU Compute Shader Infrastructure Setup
tasks.description: Set up WGPU compute pipeline infrastructure, buffer management, and shader compilation for impedance matrix calculations
acceptance_criteria: WGPU device initialization succeeds on target platforms
Compute shader compilation pipeline established with error handling
Buffer allocation/deallocation for matrix data working
Basic compute dispatch executes without crashes

tasks.title: Training Data Infrastructure for Yagi Arrays
tasks.description: Extend dataset generation to include Yagi-Uda parameter sweeps and establish data versioning system
acceptance_criteria: Dataset includes 1000+ Yagi configurations (spacing, lengths, elements)
Parameter ranges cover practical Yagi designs (0.1λ to 0.3λ spacing)
Data versioning tracks dataset schema and generation parameters
Training data validation shows <5% corrupted samples

sprints.name: GPU Acceleration + 3D Visualization
sprints.description: Implement WGPU compute shaders for impedance matrix and create advanced 3D visualization for Yagi arrays

tasks.title: WGSL Green Function Kernel Implementation
tasks.description: Write WGPU compute shader in WGSL for impedance matrix fill using Green's function kernel calculations
acceptance_criteria: WGSL shader computes Z-matrix elements with <1% error vs CPU reference
Shader handles wire segment interactions for up to 1000 segments
GPU computation 5x faster than CPU rayon implementation
Memory usage stays under 2GB for typical Yagi meshes

tasks.title: CPU vs GPU Benchmark Suite
tasks.description: Create comprehensive benchmarking system comparing WGPU compute vs CPU rayon for various antenna sizes
acceptance_criteria: Benchmark suite tests 100, 500, 1000, 2000 segment antennas
Performance metrics include computation time and memory usage
Results show GPU speedup scaling with problem size
Benchmark data exported to JSON for analysis

tasks.title: Yagi-Uda 3D Model with Element Labels
tasks.description: Create detailed 3D visualization of Yagi arrays with element identification, dimensions, and interactive labels
acceptance_criteria: 3D model shows reflector, driven element, directors with distinct colors
Element labels display length and spacing measurements
Interactive hover shows element parameters (length, diameter, position)
Model scales correctly with antenna dimensions

tasks.title: Camera Animation System
tasks.description: Implement smooth camera transitions when switching between antenna types with preset viewpoints
acceptance_criteria: Camera animates smoothly between antenna views in 1-2 seconds
Preset viewpoints optimized for each antenna type
Animation can be interrupted/cancelled by user interaction
Camera maintains proper orientation and zoom levels

tasks.title: Wireframe Toggle and Visualization Modes
tasks.description: Add wireframe rendering mode and multiple visualization options for antenna geometry
acceptance_criteria: Wireframe mode shows antenna structure without solid surfaces
Toggle between solid, wireframe, and hybrid rendering modes
Wireframe maintains element colors and labels
Performance impact <10% when switching modes

sprints.name: Interactive Smith Chart + UI Enhancements
sprints.description: Implement interactive Smith chart with simulation data integration and responsive UI improvements

tasks.title: Smith Chart Component Foundation
tasks.description: Create base Smith chart component with proper impedance/admittance grid, scaling, and coordinate transforms
acceptance_criteria: Smith chart displays standard impedance grid (0.2, 0.5, 1.0, 2.0, 5.0)
Coordinate transforms between rectangular and Smith chart coordinates accurate
Chart scales properly with container size
Grid lines and labels render clearly at all zoom levels

tasks.title: Smith Chart Simulation Data Integration
tasks.description: Connect Smith chart to MoM simulation results, plot impedance vs frequency, enable interactive frequency selection
acceptance_criteria: Impedance data from simulation plots correctly on Smith chart
Frequency sweep shows as connected curve on chart
Click on impedance point displays corresponding frequency value
Frequency markers update S11 chart cursor position

tasks.title: Responsive Sidebar Collapse
tasks.description: Implement collapsible sidebar with mobile-responsive behavior and state persistence
acceptance_criteria: Sidebar collapses automatically on screens <768px width
Manual toggle button works on all screen sizes
Collapsed state persists across page reloads
Animation smooth and doesn't affect main content layout

tasks.title: Dark Mode Toggle Implementation
tasks.description: Add system-wide dark mode with theme persistence and smooth transitions
acceptance_criteria: Dark mode toggle switches all UI components consistently
Theme preference persists in localStorage
Respects system dark mode preference on first load
Color transitions smooth without jarring flashes

tasks.title: Mobile Layout Optimization
tasks.description: Optimize layouts for mobile devices with touch-friendly controls and responsive charts
acceptance_criteria: All charts and controls usable on 375px width screens
Touch targets minimum 44px for mobile interaction
Charts resize and maintain readability on small screens
Navigation works with touch gestures

sprints.name: ML Hyperparameter Optimization + Model Versioning
sprints.description: Implement advanced ML training with hyperparameter tuning and robust model management

tasks.title: Optuna Hyperparameter Sweep Framework
tasks.description: Integrate Optuna for automated hyperparameter optimization of surrogate models with configurable search spaces
acceptance_criteria: Optuna optimizes learning rate (1e-5 to 1e-2), hidden dims (64-512), batch size (16-128)
Search completes 100+ trials with early stopping on validation loss
Best hyperparameters improve model accuracy by >10% vs default
Optimization results saved with trial history and metrics

tasks.title: Model Versioning with Metadata
tasks.description: Implement model versioning system with JSON metadata tracking training parameters, dataset versions, and performance metrics
acceptance_criteria: Each model version has unique ID with timestamp and git hash
Metadata JSON includes hyperparameters, dataset version, training metrics
Model registry allows loading specific versions by ID
Version comparison shows performance differences across models

tasks.title: Training Data Augmentation for Edge Cases
tasks.description: Implement data augmentation techniques to improve model robustness on edge cases and extreme parameter values
acceptance_criteria: Augmentation generates 2x training data with parameter noise injection
Edge case coverage includes extreme frequencies, geometries, materials
Augmented model shows <20% error on edge case test set
Training time increases <50% with augmentation enabled

tasks.title: Advanced Training Metrics and Monitoring
tasks.description: Implement comprehensive training monitoring with loss curves, validation metrics, and early stopping
acceptance_criteria: Training dashboard shows real-time loss curves and validation metrics
Early stopping prevents overfitting with patience parameter
Model checkpointing saves best weights during training
Training logs exported to TensorBoard format

tasks.title: ML Model Integration API
tasks.description: Create clean API for integrating trained ML models into the simulation pipeline with fallback to MoM
acceptance_criteria: API loads ONNX models and provides prediction interface
Automatic fallback to MoM solver if ML prediction fails
Model prediction time <100ms for typical antenna parameters
API handles model version switching without restart

sprints.name: Integration + Polish
sprints.description: Integrate all Sprint 11 features, comprehensive testing, performance optimization, and user experience polish

tasks.title: End-to-End Yagi Simulation Pipeline
tasks.description: Integrate Yagi-Uda geometry, GPU-accelerated MoM, and ML surrogate into complete simulation pipeline
acceptance_criteria: Complete Yagi simulation (geometry → MoM → results) works end-to-end
GPU acceleration automatically enabled when available
ML surrogate provides results within 5% of MoM for trained parameter ranges
Pipeline handles errors gracefully with informative messages

tasks.title: Smith Chart + S11 Chart Integration
tasks.description: Complete integration between Smith chart and S11 chart with synchronized cursors and data display
acceptance_criteria: Clicking Smith chart updates S11 chart frequency cursor
S11 chart frequency selection updates Smith chart marker
Both charts display consistent impedance/frequency data
Chart synchronization works with imported Touchstone data

tasks.title: Yagi Visualization Polish
tasks.description: Polish Yagi 3D visualization with improved materials, lighting, and performance optimization
acceptance_criteria: Yagi elements render with realistic metallic materials
Lighting enhances 3D depth perception without performance impact
Frame rate maintains >30fps with complex Yagi arrays
Visual quality scales appropriately with device capabilities

tasks.title: GPU Performance Optimization
tasks.description: Optimize WGPU compute shaders for maximum performance and memory efficiency
acceptance_criteria: GPU memory usage optimized for largest supported antenna meshes
Compute shader utilizes >80% of available GPU cores
Memory transfers minimized with efficient buffer reuse
Performance scales linearly with antenna complexity

tasks.title: Production ML Model Deployment
tasks.description: Deploy optimized ML models with proper error handling and performance monitoring
acceptance_criteria: Production models load in <5 seconds on application startup
Model inference handles invalid inputs gracefully
Performance monitoring tracks prediction accuracy vs MoM
Model updates can be deployed without application restart

shared_interfaces_needed: YagiUdaAntenna struct with element parameters for 3D rendering
WGPU compute buffer interface for impedance matrix data
ML model prediction API with ONNX integration
Training data schema for Yagi parameter sweeps
Theme system interface for dark mode support
